feed.title: SAP Community - SD (Sales and Distribution)
feed.subtitle: SD (Sales and Distribution) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Settlement Document: Tax Code and Tax determination in the manual settlement document
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are using Vertex for tax determination. While creating the manual settlement document (0S32), the tax code and tax amount are not populating at the item level. The user needs to check the tax at the line item (in the condition tab) and then enter it manually. Otherwise, the system does not allow saving the document due to the gross and net amount mismatch. In the case of automatic settlement, the taxes are determined automatically.

Is there any way to determine the tax code and tax amount automatically or at the time of saving the manual settlement document?

Please suggest. 

Thanks and Regards,

Pankaj

entry.title: Down payment scenario
entry.content: I have a scenario where in Down payment done for 40% and need to calculate tax for remaining 60% value in customer Invoice, but the system calculating tax from the total order value. In DP inv tax calculated correctly MWST 15%  but in cust invoice for the remaining net value 15% tax calculation is happening on the total order value which is not correct. Experts seeking your ...advise.

entry.title: Hi there, I have the following case with Material Substitution determination and BOM ERLA structures
entry.content:
Hi there, I have the following case with Material Substitution determination and BOM ERLA structures.

My client uses Material Determination Determ.Type A001 Material Entered in transaction VB13 with Substitution reason 0006 ProdSel - Order only. This substitution works as there is a new material that comes into use with a new number, this new material can be substituted with the old material and vice versa depending on availability. The system looks if there is stock of the old one even if you have entered the new one, and if there is stock from the old number the system substitutes it in the sales order by adding a new line item with the old material number. Therefore there is one line item with the entered new material and one line item pops up with the new old material if stock still exists. This is fine form the materials with Item Category Group NORM. However, they also have BOM materials with ERLA Structure where the header material with   Item Category Group ERLA is the stock material and it has some service items as components. When the ERLA BOM Materials are entered the material substitution does not work as described above, even though they are defined i the same way in for Material Determination type A001 Material Entered in transaction VB13 with Substitution reason 0006 ProdSel - Order only. The clients expectation is that the BOM Header Material will be substituted with the old BOM Header Material based on availability. I am curious if this is just a standard limitation of using the BOM structures. Can anyone help?

S4 Hana on Premise

entry.title: Como consultar quantos itens de uma ordem de venda fechada (VA03), já foram faturados?
entry.content:
Olá, pessoal.

Eu preciso saber quantos itens de uma ordem de venda fechada, t-code VA03, já foram faturados?

Poderiam me instruir por favor se é possível listar isso facilmente, ou se é necessário extrair e cruzar algumas tabelas no SE16N?

Ao abrir a ordem na VA03, eu tenho apenas um material, e gostaria de ver uma lista de remessas/faturas que foram geradas a partir desta ordem.

 

Obrigado,

entry.title: Stock Consumption of Packaging Material
entry.content:
I have client Requirement that Packaging Material Stock should be reduce when creating delivery/PGI.

They don't want to add Packaging Material in Line item .
How to Achieve this?

Please help

@Lakshmipathi  Please help

entry.title: I don't see contracts in the Manage condition contract sales rabate app
entry.content:
Hi people,

I am having a problem with the manage condition contracts app. Although i have active sales rebate contracts, they do not appear in the list. I tried using the different filters but I can't see them. do you know if I have to make any configuration or what could be causing this problem? can you help me with this?thanks a lot! 

SAP S/4HANA SD (Sales and Distribution) SAP Fiori

entry.title: Schema in Document Information Extraction for Create Sales Order - Automatic Extraction (4X9)
entry.content:
I have set up scope item 4X9 Create Sales Orders - Automatic Extraction in my S/4HANA 2023 Private Cloud environment. When uploading the purchase order PDF, there are corrections I would like to make that I have actioned in the Document Information Extraction application on BTP. I have corrected the fields, associated the document with the template, and assigned the template to schema SAP_purchaseOrder_schema.

When I upload the PDF in the Document Information Extraction UI, I can select this schema and the template is applied correctly. 

However, when using the UI in S/4HANA, in this case the "Create Sales Order - Automatic Extraction" fiori app, the document shows up in Document Information Extraction UI but it shows the message

"Schema associated with this document has been deleted."

Is this expected behaviour? Is it possible to associate this app "Create Sales Order - Automatic Extraction" (Scope item 4X9) with a particular schema for Purchase Orders? Or perhaps change the association in Document Information Extraction to use the schema SAP_purchaseOrder_schema when the inbound document is a Purchase Order, which is correctly identified in the header.

The plan I have selected in BTP for Document Information Extraction is the basic plan, not the premium plan.

Any guidance is much appreciated.

entry.title: Printing Multiple Invoices in S/4 Hana
entry.content:
Hi,

Please suggest any App to Print Multiple Invoices in On-Premise S/4 Hana, Client using BRF+

 

Regards

Siva

entry.title: How to change Document type via BAPI using Alternative Document Type 1/2 like in VA02
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

 

I have some difficulty to find how to change the document type of an existing sd document using a BAPI. I found this solution to enable the modification in VA02 but I'm not able to replicate it through abap code ..

 

Any idea ?

entry.title: Generate multiple invoices from a single sales document (Contract)
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

Could you please provide guidance on the following matter?

Is it possible to create multiple invoices from a single sales document? For example, for a contract, I would like to issue a new invoice for the full amount of the contract every year if the customer did not resiliate the contract within three months before the end of the year.

In this case, the contract is for a service (no delivery), and the quantity is 1.

Do I need to use a periodic billing plan for this, or is there another setting that allows for invoicing multiple times?

Best regards!

entry.title: I can not update FI document (credit notes) for customers in Norway
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I'm getting this error message F0495 "Payment reference is incorrect for Norway" when a try to update the customer port of the FI document (customer credit note)

I search a little bit on the internet and it seems to be linked to Norway KID format ?
I noted that VBRK-KIDNO is not transfered to XREF1 field of the BSEG

Can you please help how to fix it ?

Thank you!

Thank you in advance,

entry.title: How to Manage Multiple Delivery Points from a Single Sales Order in SAP?
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am a beginner in SAP and need some assistance. I have a single sales order that contains multiple line items. I need to manage multiple delivery points at the logistics level from this single order. When I create a sales order, I don't see where I can specify multiple shipping points. Could someone please explain the procedure to me? Additionally, I need to ensure that there is only one invoice for this order.

Thank you for your help!

entry.title: Re: How to Manage Multiple Delivery Points from a Single...
entry.content:
You should create multiple outbound deliveries that refer to your single sales order. Look at outbound delivery order creation and other concepts. 

Please check the following blog.

entry.title: Delivery Relevant Sales Items with Billing Plan
entry.content:
I am looking for a solution to this:

Customer orders x 10 of an item at £150.00 each.

No set delivery date. Customer will advise as and when they are to be delivered this year (when needed). They will be dispatched via standard delivery processes.

But billing will not be delivery related. Customer will be billed as per scheduled billing plan of £125 last day of each month.

How can I apply a billing plan to delivery relevant sales line?

My billing plans currently do not use Order Quantity so whilst the billing works, I have not way  to manage delivery.

entry.title: Multi currency for a customer
entry.content:
Hi ,

Please let me know if we can maintain Multiple Currency for a Single Customer.

Same customer biils in different currency

 

Rg

Siva

entry.title: Is it possible to change the name of performa invoice ?
entry.content:
Hi All,

we have a scenario in which we have to create a delivery in advance to print out the documents for custom clearance. My question is that we are going to create a perform invoice  against a delivery since at the time of documenatation we will not do a goods issue. Is it possible and Ok from process point of view to rename the performa invoice to an actual invoice so to get a custom clearnace? as for custom clearance cannot be done on a document with a header "Performa".

entry.title: Partial goods issue in S4HANA (non-cloud)
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a delivery where I have to pick 20 Kgs, for some reason 10 Kgs are missing due to late production.

Can I do a partial goods issue for 10 kgs ? or I need to adjust the qty of delivery to 10 and do a goods issue for a complete delivery and create a new one for the pending quantity? 

Please suggest, can we do a partial goods issue in SAP standard S4HANA?

entry.title: In SAP suddenly for all the customers are started to get the old invoice documents via email
entry.content: In SAP suddenly for all the customers are started to get the old past 3 years old billing invoice documents via email.

entry.title: Error loading the sales orders file using the Import Sales Orders tile
entry.content:
when I load the attached file with the Import sales orders tile, SAP displays the following error message:
Your file contains missing, invalid, or duplicate data. Number of messages: 2.

Error :

Sales order 141: Item ID 10 exists more than once.
Sheet "Order Data", rows 34 and 254
----> Sales order 141: Item ID 10 exists more than once.
Row 254 not uploaded

Sales order 151: Item ID 10 exists more than once.
Sheet "Order Data", rows 48 and 264
---->Sales order 151: Item ID 10 exists more than once.
Row 264 not uploaded

 

When I separate the lines linked to the Sales Order (Temporary ID): 141 & 151 in another file--> the two sales orders are created correctly.

I have compared lines 34 and 254 as well as 48 and 264 and I have not identified any relationship or data duplication.
Could you please tell us why this is happening? Our users do not understand this error and do not wish to separate the lines into other files as this requires them to spend additional time analysing and working, bearing in mind that the files are supplied by another department.

Regards

entry.title: Get PDF Action in Sales Contract API | S4 Output | PDF to external system
entry.content:
Is it possible to enhance the Sales Contract API(SAP Business Accelerator Hub) to include a Get PDF action similar to what is avaialable in the Billing Document API?

Get PDF of Billing Document | SAP Help Portal

We are trying to send the form output generated from the Sales contract to an external system. We are able to easily do it for billing documents since the API has the standard operation for PDF but the same is not available for Sales Contracts.For output management,we are using S4 output.
